steps.title: Identify the lab action
steps.content: Singh and colleagues started with sterilized soil, then added slurries of live microbes from different Colorado sites. The blank describes filling the pots with living organisms.

steps.title: Choose the adding verb
steps.content: "Populated" means filled with inhabitants, matching the addition of microbes. A means prevented, B means approximated, and C means cleaned of microbes, so those choices do not fit. The answer is D.
